title: An Unexploded Bomb Near the Colombia-Ecuador Border Leads to a Diplomatic Clash
summary_full: The Times photographed an unexploded munition in southern Colombia, near the Ecuadorean border. A high-stakes feud between both countries quickly ensued.
summary_public: The Times photographed an unexploded munition in southern Colombia, near the Ecuadorean border. A high-stakes feud between both countries quickly ensued.
